# Multica

Updated: 2026-06-17
Canonical: https://multica.uk/
Support: support@aigeamy.com

## Summary
Multica is a multi-channel AI automation setup service for teams that need a practical path from channel choice to launch, checkout, deployment tracking, and follow-up. It helps teams plan Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, and customer-chat automation without turning each channel into a separate setup project.

## Core pages
- Home: https://multica.uk/
- Pricing: https://multica.uk/pricing/
- Checkout fallback: https://multica.uk/checkout/
- Privacy: https://multica.uk/privacy/
- Terms: https://multica.uk/terms/

## Traffic intent pages
- multica telegram: https://multica.uk/multica-telegram/ - Multica Telegram Agent Workspace
- multi ca: https://multica.uk/multi-ca-agent-workspace/ - Multi CA Agent Workspace Guide

## Pricing anchors
- Setup Audit: $9/mo public setup audit anchor
- Automation Setup: $29/mo first multi-channel rollout anchor
- Managed Rollout: $79/mo governed rollout anchor

<!-- SAAS_NAV_START -->
# Multica Automation Setup navigation reference

Multica Automation Setup helps teams plan, launch, and track multi-channel AI automation with a clear channel rollout, pricing path, checkout flow, and console follow-up.

Canonical domain: https://multica.uk/
Category: multi-channel AI automation setup service
Audience: teams planning Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp, web chat, email, and API-based AI automation with Multica-style coordination
Pricing: Plans cover setup audits, multi-channel rollout planning, deployment guidance, console follow-up, runtime setup, and support for repeat automation launches.
Support: support@aigeamy.com
Docs repository: https://github.com/clauxel/multica-uk-docs
Upstream source context: Multica - https://github.com/multica-ai/multica

Public navigation pages:
- Features: https://multica.uk/features/
- How It Works: https://multica.uk/how-it-works/
- Use Cases: https://multica.uk/use-cases/
- Guides: https://multica.uk/guides/
- Docs: https://multica.uk/docs/
- GitHub: https://multica.uk/github/
- Pricing: https://multica.uk/#pricing/

Important limits:
- Runtime behavior depends on third-party CLIs, model providers, and local environment setup.
- Teams remain responsible for reviewing code and actions produced by agents.
- Managed launch does not replace internal security, access, or deployment policy.
- Multica Automation Setup is an independent managed setup service around Multica-style workflows; the official open-source project remains separate.
<!-- SAAS_NAV_END -->
